Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: For their season finale, Paul and Ray tackle a remote lake adventure with a precarious beaver dam to navigate. With help from Dan and Ben, the team enjoys a day full of thrilling walleye and bass fishing. The perfect finish? A shore lunch at camp with Outdoor Flavours adding unforgettable flavor to their catch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Remote Lake Showdown

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw teaches an in-depth course on fishing crankbaits in and around weeds.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this week's episode, we head out with a goal to catch Alaskan Salmon, Lingcod, and all types of other rockfish, but first, we have some more fun in the Halibut grounds while we wait for the wind to calm down.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — The Ultimate Alaskan Fishing Charter, Part 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On a near-freezing Florida day, Shaw catches trout, redfish, and ... serious trophy tarpon.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Spring Walleye fishing on Horwood Lake friendly competition with local anglers using crank baits and jigging.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode, we venture out onto Porcupine Lake for some beautiful walleye action with Craig Salmonson from Timmins Angling Adventures. Patience was key as we waited for a break in challenging weather conditions—but it all paid off with an unforgettable day on the water. Tune in for expert tips, stunning scenery, and the thrill of fishing in Northern Ontario!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Weathering the Storm: Walleye on Porcupine Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We brought in Tony Roach to talk about a popular topic in these parts: summer walleye fishing! Lots of good tips packed into this week's episode, especially if you're a fan of the gravel lizard!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This show was filmed in late October of 2019. Four months prior, in June of 2019, Tim Carnahan was diagnosed with Glioblastoma, Brain Cancer. According to Tim's medical team, his life expectancy could be between three months and 18 months. Fast forward to now, 2020; today's update is one we hoped would never come. With a heavy heart and tear-filled eyes, we share with you that Tim Carnahan has passed away after battling for close to 12 months. It only fits that the last words to pass his lips were I love you, Lory, and keep fishing. While his time on earth was cut short, the amount of joy he experienced and shared with others was genuinely tremendous and will never be forgotten. If you would like to help out in any way, lory and friends have put together a Go Fund Me page to ease the financial burden of medical bills and afford lory some time to greave and transition into life without Tim. We love you, Tim. Rest in peace, buddy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - An Unforgettable Trip, South Lake, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Operation Fishing Freedom heads south to the Gulf Of Mexico with Vietnam Army Medic John Hitchens in search of a shark. He shares his story of being a medic during the Vietnam War to becoming part of a sober bike club.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Medic John Hitchens
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro Vs Joe Lake Apache
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Aligator Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stoked On Fishing heads back to La Bocana, Mexico, for some epic offshore fishing and find yellowtail, dorado, and wahoo.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Offshore Fishing In La Bocana Mexico
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace use Humminbird Mega LIVE to pinpoint and dropshot up some Minnesota gold.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Mega LIVE Dropshot Walleyes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: WOW. Not very often am i at a loss for words but Matt and Christina know their stuff when it comes to flatheads. Absolutely unreal the amount of knowledge that was in the boat this week.
Video.title: Everything There Is To Know About Flatheads

Image.alt: Everything There Is To Know About Flatheads

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin gambles with a long run in search of big pre-spawn bass
Video.title: Episode 1
